---
title: ""
listing:
  - id: proceedings-journals
    contents: "papers/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: "../html/research/listing.ejs"
  - id: presentations
    contents: ["workshops.yml", "conferences.yml", "presentations.yml"]
    sort: "date desc"
    template: "../html/research/listing.ejs"
page-layout: full
include-back-link: false
toc-location: right
toc: true
brand: ../brand/_brand.yml
format:
  html:
    # css: html/cv.scss
    theme: 
      light: ["../html/dfb.scss","brand"]
      dark: ["../html/dfb_dark.scss","brand"]
---

## Proceedings & Journals

:::{#proceedings-journals}
:::

## Presentations

:::{#presentations}
:::
